titleStmt.title: SII 39.175: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 175. (A.R. No. 175 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARĀGHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA. SADĀŚIVADĒVA-MAHĀRĀYA, SON OF ŚRIRAṄGAPPAYADĒVA-MAHĀRĀYA-ŚAKA 1495 (1573 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription states that the images of Āḻvārs, which had been destroyed by the Muhammadans were re-installed by Appalammanavargaḷ a member of the palace of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Veṅgalaiyya in the temple at Tiruppuṭkuḻi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śrīman makāmaṇṭalecuran rācātirāca paramecuran śrīṟaṅkappayateva makārāyar kumārar catācivateva makārāyar piṟativirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 9 10 5- ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa śrīmuka caṅvassarattut tulā
nāyiṟṟup pūṟuvapaṣṣattu Ēkāteciyum putavāramum peṟṟa ṉāḷ śrī man makāmaṇṭalecuran kācipa kottirattuc cillēṭu veṅkaḷaiyyateva makārācāviniṭaiya Araimaṉaiyar Appalammanavarkaḷ muṉṉāḷ tiruppati tiruppuṭkuḻiyile
Eḻuntaruḷiyirunta Āḻvārkaḷ tulukkar Āvaṉiyile pokayil putitāka Appalammanavarkaḷ taṅkaḷ Upayamāka Eḻuntaruḷap paṇṇina Āḻvārkaḷ poykaiyār pūtattār peyāḻvār tirumiḻicaiyār maturakaviyār
periya Āḻvār toṇṭaraṭippoṭiyār tiruppāṇāḻvār kulacekarar Āka Āḻvārkaḷ Oṉpatimarum muṉṉāḷ nammāḻvār tirumaṅkaiyāḻvār cūṭikkuṭutta nācciyar yinta muṉṟu peṟkum tiruppaṇikku � kkuṭutta pon_ 7mā 2m yivar
kaḷ piṟatiṭṭaikku ceṉṟa ceṉṟapoṉṉum yinta yiraṇṭu vakaiyum Appalammaṉukkum puṇṇiyamāy mukintitu koyiṟkaṇakku vaṭamalai Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
